dayName: First Day at the Crow's Wing

scenarios.title: The Merchant's Lost Wagon
scenarios.target: recover the salt-merchant's wagon from the brigands camped at the Crow's Ford

contributions.line: Marek's brute strength helps crack the iron strongbox, but his fatigue makes him impatient and rough.
Roselle's quick reflexes and cautious nature allow her to slip past the brigand sentry, though she keeps a wary eye on the shadows.

scenarios.outcomeNarrative: Their efforts are hampered by fatigue and hesitation, leaving the lock unbroken and the sentry undisturbed, ensuring the brigands remain alert.

scenarios.title: The Brigand's Tongue
scenarios.target: wring the location of the bandit cache out of the prisoner before dawn

contributions.line: Marek's muscular frame leans into the prisoner, voice rough as he demands the truth, eyes cold and unyielding.
Veska carefully catches the shifting lies, her analytical gaze probing the prisoner's stories for cracks and inconsistencies.

scenarios.outcomeNarrative: Marek's brutal pressure causes the prisoner to falter, revealing a key detail about the bandit's hideout. Veska's sharp reading confirms the deception, guiding the team closer to their goal.

scenarios.title: Watchtower at the Pass
scenarios.target: commission a new watchtower at the southern pass before winter closes the road

contributions.line: Veska's meticulous calculations reveal the timber's flaws, but her fatigue dulls her sharp eye.
Marek's brawny strength keeps the logs aligned, though his fatigue makes him impatient with the crew.

scenarios.outcomeNarrative: The team struggles to maintain cohesion, with Veska's precise plans sidelined by fatigue and Marek's forceful oversight causing friction, leading to a fragile structure that may not hold through the spring melt.
